creator: studded@dalnet.webmaster.com
text:
While attempting to make new libs in /usr/src/lib/libc with the option -DFD_SETSIZE=1024 as described in bin/3622 make bombed out at the following location.  I tried it after a make clean, and tried with and without make depend.

/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:116: `TTY_DIALUP' undeclared (first use this f
unction)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:117: `_TTYS_NETWORK' undeclared (first use thi
s function)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:118: `TTY_NETWORK' undeclared (first use this
function)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:124: structure has no member named `ty_group'
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:124: `_TTYS_NOGROUP' undeclared (first use thi
s function)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:133: `_TTYS_INSECURE' undeclared (first use th
is function)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:141: `_TTYS_GROUP' undeclared (first use this
function)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:142: structure has no member named `ty_group'
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c: In function `isdialuptty':
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:256: `TTY_DIALUP' undeclared (first use this f
unction)
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c: In function `isnettty':
/usr/src/lib/libc/gen/getttyent.c:263: `TTY_NETWORK' undeclared (first use this
function)
*** Error code 1

Stop.


	This machine is the product of a make world (after deleting /usr/src/* and /usr/obj/* and downloading fresh 2.2.1 sources, so I have a hard time understanding this problem.  If I'm missing something obvious, my apologies.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: 	See above.
